requirement: the README shows the format and its payoff by example

findings.observation: A realistic, complete QUALITY.md excerpt (frontmatter ratingScale/targets/factors/requirements plus a Markdown body) is shown before the reference schema, matching 'before reference detail'.
Gap: the payoff is described only in prose; the README never shows what running qualitymd against the example produces (no lint output, init receipt, report.md/report.json excerpt, or rating result).
A conceptual assessment -> findings -> rating result diagram conveys the idea but is not a real tool-output example.
Re-checked: no rendered qualitymd output or report excerpt appears anywhere in README.md (only the conceptual diagram and a build-report bullet).

rationale: The format-excerpt half is well met, but the requirement explicitly asks for what running qualitymd produces, and no produced output is shown anywhere. The show-don't-tell payoff is missing, holding the requirement at the floor. Rated minimum.
